$description: Modern E-Commerce Theme - A comprehensive design system with semantic tokens for colors, sizes, and typography supporting both light and dark modes.

brand.$description: Brand identity colors — the primary product accent

primary.$description: Primary brand color - deep navy, used for headers, primary buttons, and main text

container.$description: Surface color for primary tinted backgrounds

foreground.$description: Text colors rendered on top of any surface

primary.$description: Primary text color - deep navy for headings and important text

title.$description: Title text color - same as primary

body.$description: Body text color - tertiary level text

disabled.$description: Disabled text color - for inactive elements

placeholder.$description: Placeholder text color - for input hints

icon.$description: Icon / glyph colors — parallel to foreground but scoped to iconography

body.$description: Icon color for body text areas

input.$description: Colors scoped to form controls — text fields, selects, textareas

action.$description: Colors for interactive / tappable elements — buttons, chips, FABs, toggles

ghostHover.$description: Secondary button hover state - lighter coral

canvas.$description: Screen / page background layers — the painted surface beneath all content

surface.$description: Elevated container colors — cards, sheets, and raised panels

feedback.$description: UI state signal colors — communicates the result of an action or system condition

indicator.$description: Status indicator colors — badges, chips, tags, and lifecycle pills

sizes.$description: Dimensional sizing scale for padding, spacing, radius, icons, typography, motion, and blur

padding.$description: Padding scale for internal component spacing

spacing.$description: Spacing scale for gaps between components and layout

radius.$description: Border radius scale for rounding corners

icon.$description: Icon size scale for glyphs and symbols

motion.$description: Motion duration scale for animations and transitions

blur.$description: Blur intensity scale for backdrop effects

display.$description: Display typography scale for large headlines and hero text

regular.$description: Display - Regular - Normal weight for standard body text

medium.$description: Display - Medium - Slightly emphasized text for UI elements

semiBold.$description: Display - Semi-bold - Moderate emphasis for subheadings

bold.$description: Display - Bold - Strong emphasis for headings and key text

extraBold.$description: Display - Extra bold - Heavy emphasis for prominent text

black.$description: Display - Black - Maximum weight for maximum impact

light.$description: Display - Light - Soft weight for refined display text

extraLight.$description: Display - Extra light - Very light weight for elegant display text

thin.$description: Display - Thin - Delicate, minimal weight for subtle display text
